description: Starter cold-boot fallback for Vagrant Story (USA) when no near-battle savestate is available. The wrapper now auto-extends timeout to cover the full plan plus slack and can leave screen-capture breadcrumbs. Latest visual checkpoints show the repeated START pulses can now reach the Vagrant Story title/logo, so this scaffold pauses menu navigation until after that title state and only then tries to open and drive the menu. Operator follow-up also confirmed that this build uses PSX-style menu mapping where X cancels and O confirms, so the menu-confirm steps now use CIRCLE instead of CROSS. The repo-local memcards still probe as blank formatted cards, so this revision drops the old Continue/Load branch and instead follows a title-menu New Game route: press CIRCLE on the default entry, wait roughly ten seconds, then press START twice with another ten-second gap to skip toward live player control.

steps.note: Skip the first intro video or title gate as soon as pad input becomes live.
Skip a second intro or attract-video gate if the first START only clears one clip.
Skip the publisher screen or the next skippable intro gate; earlier captures were still here when CROSS fired.
Skip the Squaresoft logo or any remaining pre-title splash.
Skip the opening FMV or attract clip; earlier captures suggest the run was just entering this phase.
Advance from the title screen into the main menu once the intro chain has been exhausted.
Open the title menu after the Vagrant Story logo has settled instead of sending menu-navigation input into the logo splash.
Confirm the default title-menu entry instead of stepping down into the blank-card Continue or Load branch.
Roughly ten seconds later, skip the first post-title cutscene gate to keep pushing toward gameplay.
After another roughly ten-second settle, skip the next gate and leave extra time for player control or the first live reader hit.
